targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT schemaname) as schemas, COUNT(*) as tables FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
SELECT schemaname as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') GROUP BY schemaname ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT schemaname as schema, tablename as table FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') ORDER BY schemaname, tablename

panels.description: 7 tables tracking every firmware version, bug, and compatibility matrix

targets.rawSql: SELECT tablename as table, 'firmware' as schema FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'firmware' ORDER BY tablename

panels.title: 💡 Example: Firmware Tables

options.content:
# 🧠 Mining Intelligence Catalog

**The world's most comprehensive Bitcoin miner knowledge base**

## 165 Tables Across 10 Schemas:

| Schema | Tables | Purpose |
|--------|--------|---------|
| **knowledge** | 5 | Source tracking, auto-discovery, citations |
| **hardware** | 10 | Chips, PSUs, boards, miners, specs |
| **firmware** | 7 | Releases, bugs, compatibility, APIs |
| **ops** | 8 | Failure patterns, thresholds, correlations |
| **market** | 7 | Reviews, pricing, reputation, war stories |
| **repair** | 9 | Parts, procedures, service records (1M+ capacity) |
| **pool** | 7 | Mining pools, network data |
| **facility** | 5 | HVAC, cooling, containers |
| **regulatory** | 5 | Compliance, standards |

## 🔥 Key Features:

✅ **Auto-Discovery Mechanism** — Never loses unknown data points
✅ **Complete Firmware Intelligence** — Every version, bug, and API endpoint
✅ **Failure Knowledge Base** — Symptom → diagnosis → repair mapping
✅ **Community Intelligence** — Reddit/Telegram/Discord aggregation
✅ **1M+ Record Design** — Built to scale with BiXBiT service network

**Status:** ✅ Fully operational on ROBS-PC (100.110.87.1:5432)
**Mining Guardian Integration:** ✅ AI consumers actively querying catalog
